aspecting the North sign of Scorpio because he is Retro. At that
time, the Betrothal (Lagnapatrika) ceremony got fixed up.
But in chart -B, Jupiter became direct. Therefore the Jupiter
aspect was annuled and hence the marriage was postponed.
Again in Chart-C, Jupiter came to the South and is
aspecting North (7th and 11th) fiDm the West. Then the marriage
took place. This is a standard example, besides being an incident
that occurred in 1997. Hence Retro motion is to be considered
with its due importance.
FRIENDLY & INIMICAL ASPECTS OF PLANETS
Planets by creation are celestial. They are not inimical by
nature. But to understand and interpret the effect they cause on
a native, by their constant motion in the cosmos. Astrological
principles delienate friendly, inimical and neutral relationships
amongst the planets.
SUN
Sun is the father of Saturn. The son Saturn is inimical to the
father, the Sun. Similarly Venus and Dragon Head are inimical to
Sun.
